ModuleTitle.helper: Used by OpenContent to sync with DNN module settings. This does not display to site visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens if you want to link directly to this section from elsewhere on the page.

SectionHeading.helper: Optional. Main heading shown above the logo grid.

IntroText.helper: Optional. Short supporting text shown under the heading.
IntroText.placeholder: Use this area to briefly explain who these logos represent.

Logos.helper: Required. Add one logo per item. This template displays up to 4 per row on desktop, 3 on tablet, and 2 on mobile.

Title.helper: Required. Used for the image alt text, aria-label, and title attributes.
Title.placeholder: Association of Nature and Forest Therapy

Logo.helper: Required. Upload a clean logo image with generous whitespace when possible for the best display.

Link.helper: Optional. Use a local or external URL if this logo should be clickable.

LinkTarget.helper: Optional. Choose whether the logo link opens in the current tab or a new tab.
